definition: I2S logs a small integer type discriminant (Type = 2, 3, 4, or 5) from the ICC parametric-curve switch CMP and substitutes it at the Type field in the input, dispatching a specific curve case arm that blind havoc never reaches.

authoring_contract.goal: ONE parameterized template.c isolating this cluster's shared mechanism, with exactly ONE compile-time -D knob = the program-feature axis. params.json:parameter MUST name that macro; scan_values sweep it; fuzzers = involved_fuzzers; expected_direction = '<winner> > <loser>'.
authoring_contract.isolate: No partial-match coverage edges unless the mechanism IS a gradient (VP families). Keep the gate the only objective.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the switch(Type) comparison against the integer literal 2, finds the current Type byte in the input, and substitutes 2 at that offset; naive and value_profile lack I2SRandReplace and never land on the exact discriminant in 24h.
signature.one_line: I2S substitutes exact integer 2 into parametric curve Type field

analysis.summary_one_line: Input must encode a parametric tone-curve Type field equal to 2 so the switch dispatches to case 2.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An ICC parametric curve whose stored Type selector decodes to the integer 2, so the switch(Type) at line 344 dispatches to case 2 (line 380). The blocker is the true side of the case-2 dispatch; the input must carry a parametricCurveType field exactly equal to 2 somewhere in the parsed profile bytes.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds reach case 2 at runtime (line 380 fires T=602000 in W vs T=0 in L) and the whole case-2 body (lines 380-404) is marked [W] winner-resolving-only, with the branch hit 304270/391450 times by the winners. The cmplog/vpc winners can place the exact byte value 2 into the Type field via I2SRandReplace because the switch(Type) comparison logs the constant operand 2.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds never take case 2: line 380 shows T=0 F=204000 for L, and the entire case-2 body is not marked [L]. naive/value_profile have no I2S substitution to plant the discriminant integer 2 into the Type field, so they stay blocked on this side for the full 24h (avg duration blocked loser=24.00h).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog and value_profile_cmplog add I2SRandReplace, which reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer for the switch(Type) comparison, finds where the current Type bytes appear in the input, and substitutes the logged constant operand (2) at those offsets, satisfying case 2 directly. naive and value_profile lack I2SRandReplace and must hit the exact discriminant by chance, which does not happen in 24h.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of the switch arm case 2 inside DefaultEvalParametricFn, selected by the Type discriminant.
The case-2 dispatch is governed by switch(Type).
Winners take case 2 while losers never do, per per-role branch divergence.
The entire case-2 body is exclusively winner-resolving coverage.
Winners hit the branch hundreds of thousands of times; losers zero.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=304270  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: Losers stay blocked the full campaign duration.
cmplog/vpc add I2SRandReplace which substitutes a logged CMP operand at matching input offsets, enabling the discriminant value.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: naive and value_profile lack I2SRandReplace.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with switch(Type) on an input-derived integer where cmplog/vpc fail to reach case 2 while naive reaches it at the same rate, i.e. no I2S advantage for hitting an exact switch discriminant.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The exact input offset encoding the Type discriminant is not isolated in the BYTE DIFF (offsets show profile-tag differences like RGB/Lab/XYZ, not a clearly distinguishable Type=2 field), so the precise substituted offset is inferred from source, not directly observed.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the switch dispatch against literal 3, logs the constant operand, and splices 3 into the input's Type field; both losers lack I2SRandReplace and produce no coverage gradient toward this specific integer, staying blocked all trials.
signature.one_line: I2S splices integer 3 into parametric curve Type to enter case 3

analysis.summary_one_line: A parametric tone-curve whose Type field equals the exact literal 3, dispatching the switch to case 3:.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An ICC parametric curve tag whose stored curve-Type integer equals the exact value 3 (the IEC 61966-3 form). The switch(Type) at line 344 must dispatch to case 3: (line 432); no other case arm reaches this branch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds drive DefaultEvalParametricFn 2,330,000 times and case 3: is taken with W T=694000 vs L T=0, i.e. the winner produces inputs whose decoded Type field is exactly 3; the cmplog/vpc winners discover the matching literal by substituting the logged comparison operand into the input.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds never take case 3: (L T=0 F=204000 at line 432) and resolve=0/10, blocked=10/10; havoc-only mutation of the Type field never lands on the exact integer 3 because there is no coverage gradient guiding it toward that single value.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: I2SRandReplace (present in both cmplog and value_profile_cmplog, absent in naive and value_profile) intercepts the switch dispatch comparison against the literal 3, logs the operand, and splices it into the input bytes so the Type field decodes to exactly 3; both losers lack I2SRandReplace and cannot solve the equality gate.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is case 3: of a switch on Type inside DefaultEvalParametricFn.
The case 3: arm is dispatched by a switch(Type) statement.
Winner inputs take case 3: while losers never do.
Both decisive pairs are I2S deltas with the cmplog/vpc side winning 10/10 and the loser blocked 10/10.
The winners drive the enclosing function far more than losers, consistent with them reaching the case 3: body repeatedly.
I2SRandReplace is the mutator that scans input for one CMP operand and substitutes the other, present in cmplog.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: The losing value_profile fuzzer has no I2SRandReplace mutator.
The losing naive fuzzer has no I2S capability.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: any of the above. No I2S.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating case 3: on an exact equality with literal 3 where naive/value_profile resolve the branch as often as cmplog/value_profile_cmplog, showing the equality gate is solvable without I2S substitution.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The exact input offset and width of the decoded Type field is not isolated in the BYTE DIFF (all offsets are tagged PARTIAL with no clean concentrated W-vs-L split pinpointing the Type bytes), so the literal-3 placement is inferred from the source dispatch rather than directly read off the seed bytes.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes logged magic/tag-table CMP operands (profile header constants gating parametric curve Type 4 selection) into input bytes, assembling the multi-field profile structure; downstream mutation then drives the computed float e to a non-positive value, reaching the false side of e>0 that plain havoc cannot approach.
signature.one_line: I2S assembles multi-field ICC profile enabling Type-4 non-positive e path

analysis.summary_one_line: An ICC profile embedding a Type-4 parametric tone curve whose coefficients drive e = Params[1]*R + Params[2] non-positive at R >= Params[4].

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Input bytes parsed into an ICC profile that selects parametric curve Type 4 (case 4, sRGB) and supplies Params[4]/Params[1]/Params[2] coefficients such that for some sample R>=Params[4] the linear form e = Params[1]*R + Params[2] evaluates to <= 0, taking the False side of the e>0 gate at cmsgamma.c:497. The structural precondition is a magic-byte-laden profile header (acsp 'acspAPPL', profile-class/colorspace tags) whose downstream tag table points at a Type-4 parametricCurveType.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winning seeds carry the lcms/acsp profile skeleton with valid header magic and varying colorspace tags (RGB/Lab) at offsets 0x14-0x16, and they drive the blocker's enclosing function 941000 times vs 204000 for losers, with the False side actually taken (W F=59900 at line 497 vs L F=0); cmplog/vpc reached this via I2S substitution (dash-row ancestors).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds reach case 4 far less (DefaultEvalParametricFn 204000 invocations) and never take the False side (L 497 F=0): they hit the e>0 True side only, so the non-positive-e configuration of a Type-4 curve is never assembled by plain havoc/CMP_MAP mutation.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/value_profile_cmplog I2SRandReplace substitutes logged CMP operands (the magic/tag-table integers gating the parametric-curve dispatch and the Type-4 selection) directly into the input bytes, assembling the multi-field profile structure that naive havoc and value_profile's Hamming-gradient feedback cannot synthesize, then letting downstream mutation drive e non-positive.

evidence_trail.claim: Both decisive pairs at this branch are I2S-delta pairs.
The second decisive pair cmplog>naive is also an I2S delta.
The blocker is the e>0 gate inside case 4 (sRGB parametric curve) where e is the linear form Params[1]*R + Params[2].
The globally blocked side is the False branch (e <= 0).
Winners exercise the False side of line 497 while losers never do.
Winners invoke the enclosing parametric-curve function far more than losers, indicating they assemble the curve-dispatch structure.
Winning seeds carry the lcms/acsp ICC profile skeleton with colorspace tags varying across RGB/Lab.
Loser-blocking seeds also carry the acsp profile skeleton but concentrate on XYZ colorspace and the same header magic.
cmplog supplies the I2SRandReplace mutator that substitutes logged CMP operands into the input.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
naive's havoc + token stack **plus** `I2SRandReplace`.
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no I2S mutator, only havoc/token.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile relies on CMP_MAP Hamming-distance feedback and has no I2S mutator.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness exposing the same e>0 gate inside a Type-4 parametric curve whose selection/coefficient fields are NOT pre-images of input bytes (e.g. fixed at compile time) shows cmplog and value_profile_cmplog resolving the False side no faster than naive and value_profile.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The exact CMP operand that I2S substitutes (the parametric-curve Type selector / tag-table offset vs the header magic) is inferred from structure and hit-count divergence rather than read directly from a logged CMP entry.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the integer constant 5 from the CmpLogObserver buffer and splices it into the input bytes at the Type field position, directly satisfying the switch equality check.
signature.one_line: I2S splices integer 5 into Type field to hit switch case 5

analysis.summary_one_line: Input must encode parametric-curve Type==5 so the switch(Type) dispatches into the case 5 arm.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A tone-curve descriptor in the ICC profile whose parametric-curve Type field equals exactly 5, so the switch(Type) at cmsgamma.c:344 selects the case 5: arm at line 542 instead of any of the other ~22 arms.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: cmplog/vpc winners drive the case 5: true side (DIVERGENT BRANCHES shows L 542 T=607000 in W vs T=0 in L), having substituted the exact integer 5 into the Type field via I2S; W coverage marks case 5: and its body lines 543-553 as winner-only [W].
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive/value_profile losers never reach the true side of case 5: (L 542 T=0 F=204000), so they exercise some other Type arm (case 1/4/-4 are [B]) but never produce the discrete Type value 5 within the 10-trial budget.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the switch comparison operand (the constant 5) from the CmpLogObserver buffer and splices it into the input bytes that feed the Type field; the equality jump on a discrete switch constant is exactly the roadblock I2S solves and naive/value_profile (lacking I2S) cannot reliably hit through blind byte mutation. value_profile_cmplog shares the same I2SRandReplace stage, which is why it wins over plain value_profile.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the case 5: arm of a switch(Type) dispatcher in DefaultEvalParametricFn.
The arm is selected by switch(Type), making the required input feature a specific discrete Type value.
Winners take the case 5: true side at high count while losers never do.
The case 5: arm and its body are winner-only coverage.
Both decisive pairs are I2S-technique deltas with the loser fully blocked.
cmplog augments naive with I2SRandReplace, which substitutes one CMP operand at matching input offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: naive (a loser) has no I2S stage, so it cannot solve the switch-constant equality directly.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog includes I2SRandReplace whereas plain value_profile does not.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic switch(Type) harness gated on the discrete constant 5 in which naive resolves the case 5: arm as fast as cmplog/vpc, showing I2S substitution is not the differentiator.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The exact input offset carrying the Type field is not isolated in the BYTE DIFF (all offsets are PARTIAL with mixed bytes), so the precise byte that I2S substitutes 5 into is inferred from source/lineage rather than directly seen.
